name: The Union House Southwestern Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds medium-size red potatoes, washed, skin left on
Vegetable oil to coat potatoes (3 to 4 tablespoons)
1 green bell pepper, cored and diced
1 red bell pepper, cored and diced
2 cups good mayonnaise (do not use salad dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook crumbled bacon for garnish.
2. Freshly snip chives for garnish.
3. Coat potatoes with oil and sprinkle with salt to taste.
4. Pierce the potatoes in several places with the tines of a fork.
5. Bake on a cookie sheet at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes, or until tender.
6. Cool the baked potatoes.
7. Cut into bite-size pieces.
8. Add peppers, onions, and celery to the potatoes.
9. Stir in mayonnaise and barbecue sauce.
10. Add additional salt, if desired, along with white pepper, cayenne pepper, and ground cumin.
11. Mix well.
12. Garnish with bacon and chives.
13. Makes about 15 servings.
